hero.title: Brew Café
hero.tagline: A perfectly crafted experience in every cup.

features.title: Budget Friendly Pricing
features.description: Premium taste without breaking the bank.

features.title: Chill Vibes & Great Atmosphere
features.description: A place where good mood meets great coffee.

features.title: Best Hangout Spot in Rampurhat
features.description: A cozy place for friends, couples, and college students.

about.title: Our Story
about.content: Welcome to Brew Café, Rampurhat's favorite spot for freshly brewed coffee, tasty bites, and unforgettable memories. We built this space with one simple idea: to provide a warm, comfortable, and affordable place where the community can come together. Whether you are catching up with friends, working on a project, or simply enjoying a quiet cup of coffee, Brew Café is your home away from home.

reviews.name: Aman S.
reviews.review: Best coffee in Rampurhat! Prices are great for students, and the vibe is totally unmatched.

reviews.name: Priya D.
reviews.review: Loved the ambiance and the cheesy burger is a must-try. Such a cozy spot to chill.

reviews.name: Rohan M.
reviews.review: Fast WiFi and good food. Really nice place to sit down with a laptop and work peacefully.

offers.title: Flat 10% Off for Students
offers.description: Show your college or school ID at the counter and get a flat 10% discount on all food items and combos!

contact.address: JL Banerjee Rd, sanghata para, Rampurhat, West Bengal 731224
